{{Quote|That is one whaladon of a ship you've hooked, Kyle.|[[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], describing the ''Doomgiver''.|audio=Whaladonship.flac|<ref name="SW:JKII:JO" />}}
The '''''Doomgiver''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] vessel used by elements of the [[Imperial Remnant]].<ref name="SW:JKII:JO" />

==Characteristics==
The ''Doomgiver'' was the size of a large [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], with a number of vertical stories eclipsing that of the contemporary [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]]. It was driven by six engines, arranged in clusters of three, similar to the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]].<ref name="SW:JKII:JO" />

Its ventral surface consisted of a number of detachable [[All Terrain Rapid Deployment Pod]]s<ref name="CSWE" /> and it had at least two command centers. The ''Doomgiver'' also had a detention center with holding cells. The ship's hangars held a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] defense force and personnel shuttles.<ref name="SW:JKII:JO" />

==History==
[[File:Doomgiver4.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Doomgiver''{{'s}} drop pods.]]
{{Quote|We need to destroy the ship before Desann and his army reaches its target...whatever it is.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|audio=DestroyDoomgiver.flac|<ref name="SW:JKII:JO" />}}
The ship was under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Galak Fyyar]]. Fyyar used the ''Doomgiver'' to transport [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Desann]]'s army, consisting of [[Reborn]] and [[shadowtrooper]]s, to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in order to destroy the [[Jedi Praxeum]]. However, [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agent and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Kyle Katarn]] infiltrated the vessel and transmitted ''Doomgiver''{{'s}} coordinates to [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], who ambushed ''Doomgiver'' above the jungle moon.<ref name="SW:JKII:JO" />

Katarn then sabotaged the ship's [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]]. Vulnerable to attack, ''Doomgiver'' was destroyed when [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] managed to destroy the bridge. Katarn escaped after a fight against Fyyar and found and rescued [[Jan Ors]] who had been held captive. The ''Doomgiver'' exploded above Yavin 4, with the bulk of the invasion force of Reborn, shadowtroopers, and Remnant troops destroyed.
Those that managed to land were killed or captured by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and New Republic troops.<ref name="SW:JKII:JO" />

==Appearances==
